name: IFR Benefits Network Device Wallet Acceptance Checklist
knownBlockers: NEXT_PUBLIC_WALLETCONNECT_PROJECT_ID is not set for production WalletConnect/RainbowKit modal support.
Full APPROVED -> REDEEMED proof requires an eligible locked customer wallet.
Production capacity must still be checked read-only before deploys; 17 GB was free after the 2026-07-18 redemption-cap release.

matrix.path: Landing, PWA install guidance, copy/share wallet entry
Customer QR proof sign and result
Customer QR proof sign and result
Landing, PWA install guidance, copy/share wallet entry
Customer QR proof sign and result
Customer QR proof sign and result or clear fallback
Customer QR proof sign and result or clear fallback
Customer proof or clear fallback if Ethereum provider is unavailable
Seller profile, rule, scanner, redeem signature

matrix.wallet: Eligible locked customer wallet plus seller wallet

completionGate: At least one iOS/iPadOS wallet-browser customer proof path passes.
At least one Android wallet-browser customer proof path passes.
At least one desktop injected seller wallet path passes.
A rejected or ineligible customer proof path is observed and readable.
An approved customer proof and seller redeem path is observed with an eligible locked test wallet.
